patches.summary: Add cmd/fj entry point and update root Use/version to 'fj'.
patches.reason: User requested binary named 'fj' to match the 'gh' convention (two-letter, muscle memory). Both cmd/fj and cmd/forgejo-pp-cli remain buildable.

patches.summary: Add 'repos issues dashboard' command using /repos/issues/search cross-repo API.
patches.reason: Novel feature T1: multi-repo triage dashboard — no single API call produces this; see research/absorb-manifest for scoring.

patches.summary: Add 'repos issues sweep' stale-issue sweeper with --dry-run, --label, --comment, --close.
patches.reason: Novel feature T6: agent-shaped read→confirm→write loop for stale issue triage.

patches.summary: Add 'notifications inbox' unified inbox command with --unread, --since, --limit.
patches.reason: Novel feature T2: cross-host notification aggregation not available in any existing Forgejo CLI tool.

patches.summary: Add 'admin runners' command for cross-org runner health sweep with --watch.
patches.reason: Novel feature T3: Forgejo-native runner commands (no other CLI exposes this); parallel org sweep with offline flag.

patches.summary: Add 'repos releases changelog <from-tag> <to-tag>' for changelog generation from issues+PRs.
patches.reason: Novel feature T4: 3-entity join (tags × issues × PRs) with label-grouped markdown/json output.

patches.summary: Add 'repos releases upload <tag> <files...>' with progress, retry, and size verification.
patches.reason: Novel feature T5: wraps generated upload endpoint with chunked progress, retry-with-backoff, and post-upload verification.

patches.summary: Add 'repos pulls queue' showing PRs awaiting review across repos.
patches.reason: Novel feature T7: cross-repo PR review queue with REPO/#/TITLE/AUTHOR/APPROVALS table.

patches.summary: Add 'repos actions status' for CI check status summary with --watch.
patches.reason: Novel feature T8: joins branch → commit → check_runs per repo with polling mode.

patches.summary: Fix AuthHeader() to return 'token <value>' instead of raw token.
patches.reason: Forgejo API requires 'Authorization: token <key>' scheme; missing prefix caused 403 on all authenticated calls.
patches.validated_outcome: fj user get-current returned 200 with is_admin:true after fix.

patches.summary: Fix doctor 'reachable (HTTP N at /)' to show actual probe path.
patches.reason: Format string hardcoded 'at /' regardless of healthPath variable value.
/version response has no 'id' field; UpsertBatch skipped and warned on every call. 'version' is the natural primary key.
